title: People
questions: What's the worst thing about people?
Why do people dislike each other so much?

What kind of people do you like best?
What kind of people do you get fed up with?
What different kinds of groups of people can you think of?
When can we use 'persons' instead or 'people' in English?
What are ordinary people? Do ordinary people vary from country to country?
Do you believe what people tell you?
What can we do to protect indigenous people around the world?
Do you like reading about famous people?
What do you think of Internet sites that help you find people?
What do you think of the cry, "People of the world unite"?
